channel.title: GitHub Swift Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: nikitabobko/AeroSpace
item.description: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS

item.title: exelban/stats
item.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

item.title: Alamofire/Alamofire
item.description: Elegant HTTP Networking in Swift

item.title: jordanbaird/Ice
item.description: Powerful menu bar manager for macOS

item.title: Whisky-App/Whisky
item.description: A modern Wine wrapper for macOS built with SwiftUI

item.title: AugustDev/enchanted
item.description: Enchanted is iOS and macOS app for chatting with private self hosted language models such as Llama2, Mistral or Vicuna using Ollama.

item.title: devMEremenko/XcodeBenchmark
item.description: XcodeBenchmark measures the compilation time of a large codebase on iMac, MacBook, and Mac Pro

item.title: MonitorControl/MonitorControl
item.description: 🖥 Control your display's brightness & volume on your Mac as if it was a native Apple Display. Use Apple Keyboard keys or custom shortcuts. Shows the native macOS OSDs.

item.title: iina/iina
item.description: The modern video player for macOS.

item.title: alienator88/Pearcleaner
item.description: A free, source-available and fair-code licensed mac app cleaner

item.title: utmapp/UTM
item.description: Virtual machines for iOS and macOS

item.title: apple/swift-collections
item.description: Commonly used data structures for Swift

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-dependencies
item.description: A dependency management library inspired by SwiftUI's "environment."

item.title: lwouis/alt-tab-macos
item.description: Windows alt-tab on macOS

item.title: gonzalezreal/swift-markdown-ui
item.description: Display and customize Markdown text in SwiftUI

item.title: rxhanson/Rectangle
item.description: Move and resize windows on macOS with keyboard shortcuts and snap areas

item.title: ninxsoft/Mist
item.description: A Mac utility that automatically downloads macOS Firmwares / Installers.

item.title: Caldis/Mos
item.description: 一个用于在 macOS 上平滑你的鼠标滚动效果或单独设置滚动方向的小工具, 让你的滚轮爽如触控板 | A lightweight tool used to smooth scrolling and set scroll direction independently for your mouse on macOS

item.title: dwarvesf/hidden
item.description: An ultra-light MacOS utility that helps hide menu bar icons

item.title: lihaoyun6/QuickRecorder
item.description: A lightweight screen recorder based on ScreenCapture Kit for macOS / 基于 ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量化多功能 macOS 录屏工具

item.title: apple/swift-log
item.description: A Logging API for Swift

item.title: macmade/Hot
item.description: Hot is macOS menu bar application that displays the CPU speed limit due to thermal issues.

item.title: Mortennn/Dozer
item.description: Hide menu bar icons on macOS

item.title: apple/swift-algorithms
item.description: Commonly used sequence and collection algorithms for Swift

item.title: linearmouse/linearmouse
item.description: The mouse and trackpad utility for Mac.
